code:
---
title: Layer Manager update Sequence
---

stateDiagram-v2
    state if_start <<choice>>
    [*] --> if_start

    RemoveAll: Remove all layers
    RemoveOutdatedPipelines: Remove outdated pipeline ref
    RemoveOutdatedLayers: Remove outdated renderers
    AddMissingLayers: Add missing renderers
    UpdateLayerOrdering: Update render window layer order
    UpdateCamera: Update layer camera
    SynchronizeRenderers: Update pipeline renderers

    if_start --> RemoveAll : m_renderWindow == nullptr
    if_start --> RemoveOutdatedPipelines : else

    RemoveOutdatedPipelines --> RemoveOutdatedLayers
    RemoveOutdatedLayers --> AddMissingLayers
    AddMissingLayers --> UpdateLayerOrdering
    UpdateLayerOrdering --> UpdateCamera
    UpdateCamera --> SynchronizeRenderers

    RemoveAll --> [*]
    SynchronizeRenderers --> [*]
repo_description: A 3D Slicer extension introducing a new displayable manager architecture for layered rendering and interaction handling.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Layer Manager的更新流程画一个状态图。核心场景是：当m_renderWindow为空指针时，直接清空所有层；否则走正常的增量更新路径。
明白。那正常路径里，是先清理过期的pipeline引用，再移除过期的renderers，对吗？这两步是顺序执行还是可能合并？
是顺序执行，先RemoveOutdatedPipelines再RemoveOutdatedLayers。之后要AddMissingLayers添加缺失的renderers，然后才能更新层序。
好的，我把主流程画出来了：从if_start判断后，else分支进入RemoveOutdatedPipelines → RemoveOutdatedLayers → AddMissingLayers → UpdateLayerOrdering。接下来是更新相机？
对，UpdateCamera之后还有一步SynchronizeRenderers，要更新pipeline里的renderers集合。最后无论是RemoveAll分支还是正常分支，都要回到终止状态。
确认一下：RemoveAll分支直接到终止，正常分支经过SynchronizeRenderers后到终止。两个入口条件分别是m_renderWindow == nullptr和else，对吗？
没错。还有个小调整：UpdateLayerOrdering这一步的名称要准确，它更新的是render window的层顺序，不是pipeline层面的。
已修正。现在完整流程是：起始判断 → 空指针则RemoveAll结束，否则依次执行RemoveOutdatedPipelines、RemoveOutdatedLayers、AddMissingLayers、UpdateLayerOrdering、UpdateCamera、SynchronizeRenderers后结束。
